# terrible_community_general_homebrew (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `force_formula` (Boolean) Force the package(s) to be treated as a formula (equivalent to `brew --formula`). To install a cask, use the `community.general.homebrew_cask` module.
- `install_options` (String) Options flags to install a package.
- `name` (String) A list of names of packages to install/remove.
- `path` (String) A `:` separated list of paths to search for `brew` executable. Since a package (*formula* in homebrew parlance) location is prefixed relative to the actual path of `brew` command, providing an alternative `brew` path enables managing different set of packages in an alternative location in the system.
- `state` (String) State of the package.
- `update_homebrew` (Boolean) Update homebrew itself first.
- `upgrade_all` (Boolean) Upgrade all homebrew packages.
- `upgrade_options` (String) Option flags to upgrade.

### Read-Only

- `changed_pkgs` (String) List of package names which are changed after module run.
- `msg` (String) If the cache was updated or not.
- `unchanged_pkgs` (String) List of package names which are unchanged after module run.
